Hello Micheal Gary Scott, 
 
We’ve received your application for the Decision Scientist position at Tesco. Thank you for taking the time to apply and for considering joining us. 
 
So, what happens next? 
 
First of all, our recruitment team will take a look at your application – if your skills and experience match the position, we’ll get in touch to arrange next steps. 
 
We know how much effort it takes to put together an application, so we review each one carefully. As soon as we’ve got any news for you, we’ll get in touch via email.
 
We are proud to have an inclusive culture at Tesco where everyone truly feels able to be themselves. This is because we not only celebrate diversity, but recognise the value and opportunity it brings. Therefore, we are committed to creating a workplace where differences are valued, and make sure that all colleagues are given the same opportunities. We’re proud to have been accredited Disability Confident Leader and we’re committed to providing a fully inclusive and accessible recruitment process. 
 
If you need any further help or have any questions, please check out our frequently asked questions on our career site. 
Thank you again for your interest in Tesco. 
 
Tesco Talent Acquisition team

subject: Your IBM Application: Next Steps
email_body:
IBM Careers
IBM Careers IBM 
 
Ref: 14499 - Business Analyst-ADM
Dear Micheal Gary Scott,
We are excited to see that you have applied for a position at IBM, and we want to ensure that you have the best opportunity to showcase your fantastic skills. We understand that a resume alone doesn't always reflect a candidate's full potential. That's why we invite you to complete one or more of the following assessments, which will help us gain a more comprehensive view of your capabilities.
IBM values accessibility and is committed to ensuring that every candidate has an equal opportunity to showcase their skills and potential. We support measures like additional time for persons with disabilities on selection assessments.
We use the following assessments for selection purposes. You will be invited to complete 1 or more of these assessments, depending on the role you are applying for. The next step in the process includes one or more assessments – described below.
The Coding Assessment - helps us to understand your level of programming knowledge and ability. You will be presented with a coding interface to solve coding challenges. This is a timed assessment.
Recorded Competency Video - this short and engaging assessment allows you to demonstrate your workplace competency beyond what a traditional resume allows. You will be presented with a pre-recorded question, and you will be asked to record your response . This is a timed assessment. 
English Language Assessment: Evaluate your English Language skills and competencies. This is a timed assessment.
We believe that these assessments will provide you with a better opportunity to showcase your skills, and we encourage you to take them seriously. We also want to make sure that you feel comfortable and supported throughout the process.
All applicants are requested to click the accommodation link below. If you are a person with a disability, please follow the link to submit any adjustments that you require, such as extra time. IBM will review the details of your requirements and work with you on any adjustment options for your application. It is important that you submit your requirements before starting any assessments. If you do not need extra time on the assessments, please mark your response in the link below.
Accommodation Form
Please note that this form must be completed for each position you apply for that requires an assessment.
For additional information and helpful tips, please visit our blog.
We appreciate your interest in joining our team and wish you the best of luck as you complete these assessments. We can't wait to see all that you have to offer!
Sincerely,
The IBM Talent Acquisition Team

subject: Welcome to Infineon Technologies Careers
email_body:
Infineon Careers 
Infineon Careers Banner
Hi Micheal Gary Scott, Welcome to Infineon Technologies Careers!
Here is a checklist for you
1. Build a rich profile:
Add all your experiences, skills, projects, and courses to fully represent yourself!
Update your profile
2. Understand your job matches:
Jobs that match based on your profile will be specifically marked as a "good match" or "strong match".
3. Track your applications:
View the real-time status of all your submitted applications.
4. Set custom alerts:
Be the first to know about new job opportunities at Infineon. Get meaningful alerts for recommended jobs directly into your inbox. Here you have two options:
The Job Notification is based on your CV and search behavior. Configuring it manually is not possible. But you can define how often you would like to receive it.
The Job Alert can be configured manually. For that open the Job Search within the Candidate Profile and set your preferred filters e.g. location or job family. Based on that you can activate the job alert and define a frequency.

subject: Action Required for your Amazon Application – Complete Assessment
email_body:
Action Required for your Amazon Application – Complete Assessment
Amazon.jobs
	
Hi Michael Gary Scott,
Thank you for your interest in Amazon! The next step of the application process is the online assessment. The assessment that you are about to complete is an important part of the hiring process to help us learn more about you. Please complete this online assessment in the next two weeks. If you do not complete it, you will not move forward in the hiring process.
Before beginning your online assessment, please review the following instructions and helpful hints:
 Do not click the ‘Start the assessment’ link below until you are ready to start and complete the assessment.
 Please complete the assessment as soon as possible.
 Take the assessment in a quiet, distraction-free environment.
 Set aside 50-60 minutes in a place where you can focus to give yourself plenty of time to complete the assessment.
 Ensure you have a reliable internet connection during the assessment.
 While you are able to use a mobile device to take the assessment, we recommend completing it on a larger screen such as a tablet, laptop or desktop computer.
 You can find more information on assessments at Amazon here:
 https://www.amazon.jobs/en/landing_pages/assessments
 If you need an accommodation, more information can be found here: https://www.amazon.jobs/en/disability/us
 After completing the assessment, you can take an optional feedback survey.
 You will know you have completed the entire assessment when you see the confirmation page at the end.
To begin your assessment, use the link below:
Start My Assessment
Note: This link is unique to you.
Troubleshooting
 For any technical issues, refer to the troubleshooting guides in the assessment. If those do not work, examine closely where you left off, log out, and log back in using the link above. Please do not repeatedly refresh the screen.
 If technical issues cannot be resolved, please contact your recruiter immediately.
We recognize this is a large time investment. We value the people we hire and we appreciate your interest in Amazon. You will be contacted in the event we decide to move forward with your application.
FAQs
Want to catch a glimpse of what it is like working at Amazon?
 You can refer to amazon.jobs.
How can I best prepare for the assessment?
 Review the Assessments page on Amazon.jobs. Setting aside an appropriate amount of time and finding a quiet location will be important. Do not forget that a strong Internet connection is also key.
I cannot complete the online assessment within the number of days allocated. May I request an extension?
 Yes; however, Amazon hires on a rolling basis and a delay in completing the online assessment may impact your candidacy. If you require an extension, please email your recruiter and our team will follow up within three business days of your email.
Can I take a break during the assessment?
 Sure! We suggest taking a short break in between evaluation modules or sections. Stretch, move around or grab a glass of water before finishing the rest of the assessment. You don’t need to log out to take a quick break. If for some reason you do need to interrupt your session and log out, you can click on the “Start the assessment” link to log back in and resume.
What should I do, if due to a disability, I require accommodation prior to starting the assessment?
 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. We not only celebrate the diversity of our workforce, we celebrate the diverse ways we work in. If you have a disability and need an accommodation, please reach out to your recruiter or click on this link for more information, https://www.amazon.jobs/en/disability/us.
What should I do if I experience technical issues?
 For any technical issues, refer to the troubleshooting guides in the assessment. If those do not work, examine closely where you left off, log out and log back in using the link above. Please do not repeatedly refresh the screen. If technical issues cannot be resolved, please contact your recruiter immediately.
How can I be sure that I have submitted the assessment successfully?
 You will receive a confirmation email within a few minutes of your submission.
Best regards,
Amazon Recruiting Team

Dear Michael Gary Scott,
Thank you for your interest in Clarivate!
We have received your application and want to provide you with information on our hiring process. Clarivate's Interview process starts with an introductory call with our Talent Acquisition team. If you are selected for the initial screening, you will hear directly from our Talent Acquisition team member assigned to this position. The top candidates are then scheduled with the hiring manager for the initial interview, Round 1; and finalist candidates will meet the extended team for Round 2 interviews. Depending on the role you are interested in, the Round 2 interview may include a presentation or technical assessment. Finalist candidates will be asked to provide references and submit to background checks prior to hire.

subject: Deel // Nice to Meet You!
email_body:
Dear Michael Gary Scott,
Thank you for your interest in Deel. We're excited to meet you. 
Our Talent Acquisition team will review your application quickly. In the meantime, we’d like to share some information about who we are, what we believe, and what happens next in our hiring process.
What We Believe
At Deel, we believe that talent is borderless and geography should never be a barrier to opportunity. The perfect job or perfect candidate isn’t always someone who lives less than 30 miles away. We are building a future where it doesn’t matter if you’re in Tokyo and your dream job is in Paris. A future where companies can hire anyone, anywhere, even if they’re halfway around the world. 
Who We Are
At Deel, we are living the future we are building. With team members in over 80 countries, we love the work we do and the freedom we have to make an impact. 
And it never stops: a globally distributed team can work at Deel Speed. We collaborate across time zones and continents to learn, innovate, and build the future of work. 
What Happens Next
Our Talent Acquisition team will review your application and if there is strong alignment with the position. We will schedule a call to get to know you better and to answer any questions you have about Deel and the role.
We know that putting together a resume and application is a lot of work. We receive a large number of resumes, and we give each one thoughtful consideration. We appreciate your patience through this process.
At Deel, our goal is to find the right opportunity for each candidate. If there's no alignment to the available role we’ll let you know. But we’ll ask you to please stay in touch. Things change, and we continue to grow.
Deel Team ❤️
summary: what happens next our talent acquisition team will review your application and if there is strong alignment with the position. we will schedule a call to get to know you better and to answer any questions you have about deel and the role.

subject: Thank you for applying to QuinStreet
email_body:
Hi Michael Gary Scott,
Thank you for applying to the Data Analyst position. While this letter is automatically generated, our candidate review process is not. Here's what will happen next:
People, not robots read your resume. People who know about the position review each resume that is submitted to us.
Our goal is to have your resume reviewed within two weeks of submitting it to us.
If you're selected to move to the next stage of the interview process, a recruiter will reach out to conduct a preliminary phone screening.
If you're not selected for an interview, please know there are most likely several factors that influenced our decision. One major influencer is unfortunately out of your control - the strength of our candidate pool. Oftentimes, you may have good to great professional experience, but we have to send a rejection because of the level of competition for the role is so high.
Thank you again for submitting your resume for our review. We will make every effort to provide you with consistent communication during your candidacy with us, regardless of the outcome.
Please keep in mind, a QuinStreet Recruiter will never ask you to purchase equipment or ask for any personal information (ie - bank information, deposit checks, personal identity number, government identification) and will only receive email communication from our domains, @quinstreet.com and/or @us.greenhouse-mail.io.
 
Thank you for applying!
The Recruiting Team
summary: while this letter is automatically generated, our candidate review process is not. if you're selected to move to the next stage of the interview process, a recruiter will reach out to conduct a preliminary phone screening.

subject: Thank You for Applying at Pilot
email_body:
Hi Michael Gary Scott,
 
Thank you for your interest in Pilot! We have received your application and are delighted that you would consider joining our team.
 
We will review your background and experience shortly and will get in touch with you if there is a fit for this role. 
 
Please note that we get hundreds of applications and unfortunately we cannot respond individually to all applicants. If you are not selected for this opportunity, keep an eye on our careers page as we are growing and opening new positions often.
 
In the meantime, if you’d like to learn more about Pilot, you can visit these resources:
 Pilot’s website
 
 
Thanks,
The Pilot Team
RECRUITMENT SCAM NOTICE
Recruitment fraud is a sophisticated scam offering fake job opportunities. This type of fraud can occur through false websites, impostor profiles, fake job postings on job boards, phishing e-mails claiming to be from the company, etc. The fraudsters often request recipients to provide sensitive personal or financial information (SSN, bank account, etc.) and/or to make payments. 
 
Please note that employment offers and any requests for information will always be made by a Pilot employee with a @pilot.com email address. If you are receiving an employment inquiry or employment offer from a non @pilot.com email address, please assume it is not genuine. Pilot never asks job seekers to make any payment as part of the recruiting process. If you have any questions about the authenticity of the Pilot recruitment process or an offer that you have received, please contact us by email at . If you have provided monies or other sensitive personal information and suspect you are the victim of fraud, please contact your local authorities or the Federal Trade Commission at 1-877-382-4357 or online at ftc.gov/complaint.

subject: Thank you for your Application!
email_body:
Microsoft 
Hi, Michael Gary Scott, 
Thank you for applying to the Data Analyst (Job number:1755053) position at Microsoft! We're glad you're interested in a career at Microsoft and we're here to help you find a perfect fit.
 
You may not receive feedback from us on your application directly, but please know that it’s being evaluated, and you’ll hear from us as soon as the review process is complete. If you’re selected for an interview, you’ll be notified by someone on the recruiting team.
 
You can view your application status updates through your Action Center. If you see the job moved to an Archived state, that means the position is either no longer open, you withdrew from consideration, or you were not selected for the role.
 
You may notice that we move your application from one role to another. This may happen a few times and is a normal part of our recruiting process. So, if you see the job you applied to in an Archived state, and a new job listed as Active, please know that this is normal and does not negatively impact your candidacy in any way.
 
How’s your profile?
A key part of the review process is evaluating your profile in relation to the job requirements, so please make sure your profile is accurate and extensive – it’s our first step in getting to know you! You can build your profile anyway you’d like – you can import it from , manually update it, or import/attach a resume. The most important thing is that your profile tells your story!
 
We encourage you to check back frequently and continue to look for opportunities that match your interests, as new jobs are being posted regularly.
 
Thank you,
Microsoft Recruiting
 
This mail is sent from an unmonitored mailbox. Please

subject: Thank you for applying to Flywheel Digital
email_body:
Hi Michael Gary Scott,
Thank you for applying to the Product Data Analyst with us. We appreciate the time you’ve taken to apply for the role and look forward to reviewing your application.
 
We know it can be exciting and scary applying for a job, so here is what you can expect next! 
 
Application Review. It will happen. As we sometimes get upwards of 100+ applications for some roles, it can take some time, but every applicant can expect a note regarding their application status.
 
Interview Selection. If we don’t set up a call for this job, don’t worry. It doesn’t mean you’re not a great fit for us, it just means that sometimes there is a lot of competition for a great job.
 
Interview Process. Every role starts the same, an introductory call with someone from our Recruitment team. We will be looking for company and values-fit as well as your professional experience; there may be some technical role-specific questions during this call. 
 
Every role is different after the initial call, but you can expect to meet several people from the team 1:1 and there might be further skill assessments in the form of a Take Home Assignment/Case Study Presentation or Pair Programming/Live Coding exercise depending on the role. In your initial call, we will walk you through exactly what to expect the process to be.
 
Where We Interview: Currently interviews are being conducted virtually, but for candidates that are comfortable and interested, we have started meeting people in our offices.
 
Transparency. We appreciate and value your time, so we try to make the on-site interview process as efficient as possible. Before every interview, you will receive a note letting you know what to expect as well as who you will be meeting.
 
Good luck and speak soon,
Talent Team @ Flywheel Digital 
 
** Please note:

Great news – we’ve received your application for the role of Data Analyst. We’re thrilled you took the time to explore a career with us. You’re now one step closer to joining the Target team and working somewhere you love. At Target, we value diverse perspectives, treating everyone with respect and bringing our authentic selves to work every day. We are constantly working to build relationships by partnering openly across the business and recognizing and celebrating each other’s wins. We strive to make a meaningful impact by encouraging a growth mindset and dedicate ourselves to doing the right thing for Target’s guests and team.
What happens next?
Good question!
We will review your application and be in touch with next steps if you’re selected to move forward in the application process. We’ll contact you at the email address or phone number you provided in your candidate profile, so be sure to keep your contact info up to date.
How do I make updates?
If you need to update your contact information, you can return to your Candidate Home page at any time. You can also check in on the status of your application, complete pending tasks or apply to additional roles.
Anything else?
ACTION REQUESTED for United States Candidates: Please complete a brief WOTC Voluntary Questionnaire related to Target’s participation in the federal Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC) program, if you haven't done so already. We ask all applicants to complete this voluntary questionnaire. The information you provide is confidential and not made available to or used by the hiring team. Your responses are only used in connection with Target's tax returns. By selecting the link above, you’ll be directed to a third-party site to complete the questionnaire.
For now, please sit tight. You’ll hear from us soon. In the meantime, visit our careers FAQs for answers to common application questions. You can also 
Thanks again for interest in a career with Target. We wish you all the best in your job search!
Sincerely,
Target Human Resources

 Every resume that comes in for a job prior to an offer being made is reviewed by a recruiter.

subject: Thank you for your application to GoodRx
email_body:
Hey Hey, Michael Gary Scott,
Greetings from the GoodRx mothership. We're super-pumped that you share our passion for fixing America's broken healthcare system, and we'd very much like to see you as our next Data Engineer Internship.
We make sure to review all applications, except for the ones written completely in crayon, because current laws prohibit us from hiring 3-year-olds. We plan to schedule interviews in the next few weeks once we've been able to review submitted resumes and get our business pants back from the dry cleaner. 
We promise to get back to you because that's the nice thing to do. If there's not a fit, we promise to email and let you know. If we're feeling that special tingle, one of our recruiters will email you to schedule a preliminary phone interview. Now would be a good time to practice your favorite karaoke song. 
In any case, we will keep you posted on the status of your application.
Thank you, again, for taking the first step!
Best,
The GoodRx Team
